faq.question: When is the official launch?
faq.answer: We're targeting a public launch in the next few weeks. Waitlist members get access first.

faq.question: Is there a cost to join the waitlist?
faq.answer: No, joining the waitlist is completely free and comes with exclusive founder perks.

faq.question: What happens after I sign up?
faq.answer: You'll receive a confirmation email and early access instructions as soon as we open the doors.
